# attractor-tools

Tool execution abstraction crate defining async traits for filesystem and shell operations (`ExecutionEnvironment`, `Tool`), concrete local implementations (`LocalExecutionEnvironment`), LLM-callable tool profiles (`ToolProfile`), output truncation strategies, and six built-in tools (`ReadFileTool`, `WriteFileTool`, `EditFileTool`, `ShellTool`, `GrepTool`, `GlobTool`).

## Contents

- [Cargo.toml](./Cargo.toml) — Package manifest and workspace crate metadata.

## Subdirectories

- [src/](./src/) — Async trait definitions (`ExecutionEnvironment`, `Tool`), `LocalExecutionEnvironment` tokio implementation, `ToolProfile` provider configurations, `ToolRegistry`, truncation utilities, and six built-in tool implementations in `builtin/` subdirectory using the `ExecutionEnvironment` abstraction.

## Stack

Rust library crate. Dependencies: `tokio` (async runtime), `async_trait` (trait objects), `serde`/`serde_json` (serialization), `regex` (pattern matching), `globset` (file globbing), `libc` (process signals).

## API Surface

`lib.rs` barrel re-exports: traits `Tool`, `ExecutionEnvironment`; types `LocalExecutionEnvironment`, `ToolProfile`, `ToolRegistry`, `ToolDefinition`, `ExecResult`, `DirEntry`, `GrepOptions`, `TruncationMode`; functions `truncate_output`; built-in tool structs `ReadFileTool`, `WriteFileTool`, `EditFileTool`, `ShellTool`, `GrepTool`, `GlobTool`.
